title: OrientedBoundingBox3D Object
description: Transient object that represents an oriented 3D bounding box. An oriented 3D bounding box is a rectangular box that can be in any orientation in model space. They are created statically using the create method of the OrientedBoundingBox3D class and are used by some functions to return oriented box information.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: contains
methods.description: Determines if the specified point lies within the oriented bounding box.

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Create a copy of this oriented bounding box.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a transient oriented bounding box object.

methods.name: setOrientation
methods.description: Sets the orientation of the oriented bounding box.

properties.name: centerPoint
properties.description: Gets and sets the centerPoint point of the oriented box.

properties.name: height
properties.description: Gets and sets the height of the oriented bounding box in centimeters.

properties.name: heightDirection
properties.description: Gets the direction of the height of the oriented bounding box. A unit vector is always returned.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: length
properties.description: Gets and sets the length of the oriented bounding box in centimeters.

properties.name: lengthDirection
properties.description: Gets the direction of the length of the oriented bounding box. A unit vector is always returned.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: width
properties.description: Gets and sets the width of the oriented bounding box in centimeters.

properties.name: widthDirection
properties.description: Gets the direction of the width of the oriented bounding box. A unit vector is always returned.

classType.title: OrientedBoundingBox3D.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

contains.title: OrientedBoundingBox3D.contains Method
contains.description: Determines if the specified point lies within the oriented bounding box.
contains.return_description: Returns true if the point lies within the bounding box.

parameters.name: point
parameters.description: The point to test containment with.

copy.title: OrientedBoundingBox3D.copy Method
copy.description: Create a copy of this oriented bounding box.
copy.return_description: Returns the new oriented bounding box copy.

create.title: OrientedBoundingBox3D.create Method
create.description: Creates a transient oriented bounding box object.

syntax.python: returnValue = adsk.core.OrientedBoundingBox3D.create(centerPoint, lengthDirection, widthDirection, length, width, height)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = adsk::core::OrientedBoundingBox3D::create(centerPoint, lengthDirection, widthDirection, length, width, height);

create.return_description: Returns the new oriented bounding box.

parameters.name: centerPoint
parameters.description: The center point of the oriented box.

parameters.name: lengthDirection
parameters.description: A Vector3D object that defines the direction of the length of the oriented bounding box. The magnitude of the vector is ignored and just the direction is used.

parameters.name: widthDirection
parameters.description: A Vector3D object that defines the direction of the width of the oriented bounding box. The magnitude of the vector is ignored and just the direction is used. The width direction must be perpendicular to the length direction.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The length of the oriented bounding box in centimeters.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the oriented bounding box in centimeters. The width of the box is always perpendicular to the length.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the oriented bounding box in centimeters. The height of the box is perpendicular to the length-width plane using the right-hand rule where you cross the length into the width.

setOrientation.title: OrientedBoundingBox3D.setOrientation Method
setOrientation.description: Sets the orientation of the oriented bounding box.

parameters.name: lengthDirection
parameters.description: A Vector3D object that defines the direction of the length of the oriented bounding box. The magnitude of the vector is ignored and just the direction is used.

parameters.name: widthDirection
parameters.description: A Vector3D object that defines the direction of the width of the oriented bounding box. The magnitude of the vector is ignored and just the direction is used. The width direction must be perpendicular to the length direction.
